name: declaration_initialized_var_read_modify_write
description: Code should include a variable initialized in its declaration that is later subject to read-modify-write assignment (e.g., i = i + 1'b0) in an initial block, creating conflicting drivers when the tool evaluates both the declaration initializer and procedural assignment without proper sequencing.

name: procedural_block_multiple_value_sources
description: Code should include a variable that receives values from both its declaration initializer and a procedural assignment in an initial block, which causes the tool to generate conflicting drivers when it fails to model the sequential evaluation order specified by SV LRM 6.8.

name: declaration_init_read_with_self_reference
description: Code should include a variable declared with an initializer that is read in an expression for its own assignment within an initial block, which triggers the tool to incorrectly treat declaration initializer and procedural assignment as concurrent drivers.
